task:
Enrich the service detail template for SEO/SERP (it renders all 8 services via generateStaticParams). Using the service's new fields from lib/site.ts (benefits, process, faq, metaDescription, long):
-
notes: Updated service detail page to use new fields from lib/site.ts (benefits, process, faq, metaDescription, long). Added intro/overview paragraph with Northern NJ and mobile mentions, benefits list, process steps, FAQ section with GlassCards, internal links to related services and contact. Injected JSON-LD with Service and FAQPage schemas. Updated generateMetadata to use service.metaDescription and enriched title. Removed hardcoded benefits and whyItMatters objects; replaced with dynamic data. Preserved existing hero, design language, and QuoteCTA.
